governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Official ECOSTRESS page requests citation and states copyright/all rights reserved; converted matrices are private/internal until redistribution rights are clarified.

identity.description: ECOSTRESS manmade all axis 0d1ca66e. v2.0 standardized NIRS package: 1 spectral source(s), 3 declared target(s). Auto-generated from dataset_card.json (verify before publication).

diagnostics.interpretation: Rupture aux jonctions de détecteurs, calibration locale ou sonde différente.
diagnostics.label: Splice / raccord détecteurs

diagnostics.interpretation: Décalage systématique entre campagnes, instruments ou référence blanche.
diagnostics.label: Erreur calibration / référence blanche

diagnostics.interpretation: Effet systématique du support, blanc/noir, transflectance ou environnement de mesure.
diagnostics.label: Fond différent

diagnostics.interpretation: Artefacts numériques ou traitement spectral incorrect.
diagnostics.label: Erreur interpolation / rééchantillonnage

diagnostics.interpretation: Combinaison possible changement de sonde + splice, amplifiée par géométrie, fond ou calibration.
diagnostics.label: Signature VERA25-like

diagnostics.interpretation: Modification de l'illumination, collecte, angle ou distance sonde-échantillon.
diagnostics.label: Différence de sonde / géométrie

diagnostics.interpretation: Couverture partielle du spot; contribution du fond ou du support.
diagnostics.label: Mélange feuille + fond

diagnostics.interpretation: Variété, espèce, lot ou condition différente mais physiquement plausible.
diagnostics.label: Spectre hors domaine valide

top_classes.name: Spectra obtained from the Noncoventional Exploitation FactorsData System of the National Photographic Interpretation Center.
Spectra obtained from the Noncoventional Exploitation FactorsData System of the National Photographic Interpretation Center. Original filename 0834UUURBR.
Unweathered, transparent construction plate window glass. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.glass.solid.0796uuu.spectrum.txt
White weathered construction marble. Sample was beach sidewalk from Greece (Naxos). Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.construction.marble.solid.0722uuu.spectrum.txt

Unspecified rubberized coating from a building roof. Sample was white, weathered, and five years old. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.rubber.solid.0795uuu.spectrum.txt
Unspecified rubber from a building roof. Sample was black and weathered Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.rubber.solid.0833uuu.spectrum.txt
Unspecified fiberglass-reinforced rubber from a building roof. Sample was white and weathered. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.rubber.solid.0834uuu.spectrum.txt
Weathered slate roofing shingle from government building roofing shingle. Sample was gray. Original ASTER Spectral Library name was jhu.becknic.manmade.roofing.shingle.solid.0680uuu.spectrum.txt
